zones.name: Profile Town
zones.description: A guided interactive resume path presented as a premium retro-inspired world.

zones.name: Trades District
zones.description: Future zone for electrician and field-work capability.

zones.name: Builder Labs
zones.description: Future zone for automation, systems, and web product work.

resumeSections.title: Who Michael Is
resumeSections.summary: Builder-minded operator with practical trade experience and a bias for useful systems.
resumeSections.details: Michael Costea builds practical systems, automations, and web tools that turn ideas into reliable workflows. He sits at the intersection of hands-on execution, systems thinking, and product-minded problem solving.
resumeSections.impact: Strong fit for roles needing someone who can both do the work and improve the way the work gets done.

resumeSections.title: Field Credibility
resumeSections.summary: Hands-on technical delivery, field execution, and real-world problem solving.
resumeSections.details: Grounded in practical on-site work, diagnostics, quality-focused delivery, and getting results in environments where constraints are real and performance matters.
resumeSections.impact: Shows Michael can execute reliably in practical settings, not just talk strategy.

resumeSections.title: Systems & Automation
resumeSections.summary: Automation workflows, internal tools, and product-style execution.
resumeSections.details: From workflow automation to interactive web builds, Michael focuses on systems that improve execution, visibility, repeatability, and operational leverage.
resumeSections.impact: Demonstrates product thinking and the ability to convert messy work into scalable systems.

resumeSections.title: Operations & Leadership
resumeSections.summary: Execution discipline, process thinking, and operational reliability.
resumeSections.details: Process improvement, service flow thinking, operational stability, and practical coordination across moving parts. Michael brings structure to execution and helps turn effort into dependable outcomes.
resumeSections.impact: Signals leadership value through reliability, coordination, and system improvement.
